package rulecoverage

func PositiveGormFindWithoutLimitOnHandlerPath() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_find_without_limit_on_handler_path"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Request-path GORM Find(...) chains with no visible Limit(...) step."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
